issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (card attacks), not 'Activated' (manual ability)
Condition is incomplete. Must check for Character with cost ≥ 8 on your board, not just any Character. Should be: {"type":"HasCardOnBoard","name":"Character","minCost":8}
Action should allow choosing 0 or 1 target (up to 1), not force selection. Should include 'optional':true or 'maxTargets':1

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] If you have a Character with a cost of 8 or more, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less.
